description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Android that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests, ignoring changes to markdown files and documentation. The workflow should concurrently build the project, installing gettext, checking out the code, setting up JDK 17, accepting SDK licenses, installing CMake, caching the CMake build folder, building the project with Gradle, and uploading the debug APK as an artifact if not in an Actions environment.
